# Gotify REST-API.

> This is the documentation of the Gotify REST-API.

## API Reference

- [Gotify REST-API.](/api.html): This is the documentation of the Gotify REST-API.
- [Return all applications.](/api.html#operation-application-get): GET /application
- [Create an application.](/api.html#operation-application-post): POST /application
- [Update an application.](/api.html#operation-application-id-put): PUT /application/{id}
- [Delete an application.](/api.html#operation-application-id-delete): DELETE /application/{id} - Requires elevated authentication.
- [Upload an image for an application.](/api.html#operation-application-id-image-post): POST /application/{id}/image
- [Deletes an image of an application.](/api.html#operation-application-id-image-delete): DELETE /application/{id}/image
- [Return all messages from a specific application.](/api.html#operation-application-id-message-get): GET /application/{id}/message
- [Delete all messages from a specific application.](/api.html#operation-application-id-message-delete): DELETE /application/{id}/message
- [Authenticate via basic auth and create a session.](/api.html#operation-auth-local-login-post): POST /auth/local/login
- [End the current session.](/api.html#operation-auth-logout-post): POST /auth/logout - Clears the session cookie and deletes the associated client.
- [Handle the OIDC provider callback (browser).](/api.html#operation-auth-oidc-callback-get): GET /auth/oidc/callback - Exchanges the authorization code for tokens, resolves the user,
- [Start the OIDC flow to elevate an existing client session (browser).](/api.html#operation-auth-oidc-elevate-get): GET /auth/oidc/elevate - Redirects the user to the OIDC provider's authorization endpoint. After
- [Initiate the OIDC authorization flow for a native app.](/api.html#operation-auth-oidc-external-authorize-post): POST /auth/oidc/external/authorize - The app generates a PKCE code_verifier and code_challenge, then calls this
- [Exchange an authorization code for a gotify client token.](/api.html#operation-auth-oidc-external-token-post): POST /auth/oidc/external/token - After the user authenticates with the OIDC provider and the app receives
- [Start the OIDC login flow (browser).](/api.html#operation-auth-oidc-login-get): GET /auth/oidc/login - Redirects the user to the OIDC provider's authorization endpoint.
- [Return all clients.](/api.html#operation-client-get): GET /client
- [Create a client.](/api.html#operation-client-post): POST /client
- [Update a client.](/api.html#operation-client-id-put): PUT /client/{id}
- [Delete a client.](/api.html#operation-client-id-delete): DELETE /client/{id} - Requires elevated authentication.
- [Elevate a client session.](/api.html#operation-client-id-elevate-post): POST /client/{id}/elevate - Requires elevated authentication.
- [Return the current user.](/api.html#operation-current-user-get): GET /current/user - Requires elevated authentication.
- [Update the password of the current user.](/api.html#operation-current-user-password-post): POST /current/user/password - Requires elevated authentication.
- [Get gotify information.](/api.html#operation-gotifyinfo-get): GET /gotifyinfo
- [Get health information.](/api.html#operation-health-get): GET /health
- [Return all messages.](/api.html#operation-message-get): GET /message
- [Create a message.](/api.html#operation-message-post): POST /message - __NOTE__: When authenticating with a client token or basic auth, the request body
- [Delete all messages.](/api.html#operation-message-delete): DELETE /message
- [Deletes a message with an id.](/api.html#operation-message-id-delete): DELETE /message/{id}
- [Return all plugins.](/api.html#operation-plugin-get): GET /plugin
- [Get YAML configuration for Configurer plugin.](/api.html#operation-plugin-id-config-get): GET /plugin/{id}/config
- [Update YAML configuration for Configurer plugin.](/api.html#operation-plugin-id-config-post): POST /plugin/{id}/config
- [Disable a plugin.](/api.html#operation-plugin-id-disable-post): POST /plugin/{id}/disable
- [Get display info for a Displayer plugin.](/api.html#operation-plugin-id-display-get): GET /plugin/{id}/display
- [Enable a plugin.](/api.html#operation-plugin-id-enable-post): POST /plugin/{id}/enable
- [Websocket, return newly created messages.](/api.html#operation-stream-get): GET /stream
- [Return all users.](/api.html#operation-user-get): GET /user - Requires elevated authentication.
- [Create a user.](/api.html#operation-user-post): POST /user - With enabled registration: non admin users can be created without authentication.
- [Get a user.](/api.html#operation-user-id-get): GET /user/{id} - Requires elevated authentication.
- [Update a user.](/api.html#operation-user-id-post): POST /user/{id} - Requires elevated authentication.
- [Deletes a user.](/api.html#operation-user-id-delete): DELETE /user/{id} - Requires elevated authentication.
- [Get version information.](/api.html#operation-version-get): GET /version
